files.description: Repo execution and code-generation law: polymorphic collapse, typed rails, entry-point and dependency policy, comment discipline, file organization
Agent load order and engineering contract: planning-state scope, design-doc completeness bar, .api/ obligations, monorepo topology frame
Workspace structure register: strata, branch coupling, library-first ownership, entry rails
The review standard for design-corpus work: fence-as-product law, the decision-complete bar, universal principles, workflow roles
Bundle-craft standard for skill and agent estate work: trigger-description construction, root-as-router disclosure, frontmatter policy, bundle defect classes
Authoring defect catalog for skill and agent bundles: trigger, disclosure, body, and artifact defect classes, each with its detection test and copyable repair
Named prose defect catalog for durable markdown: per-class detection tests, true-positive discriminators, and reframe rules
